auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Linkly API key used as a Bearer token. Generate or manage API keys under Settings > API Keys in Linkly, or see https://linklyhq.com/url-shortener-api-reference.

actions.name: create_link
actions.description: Create a Linkly short link in a workspace.

anyOf.description: Custom domain without a trailing slash.

domain_id.description: Domain ID, used as an alternative to domain.

forward_params.description: Whether to forward query parameters to the destination.

anyOf.description: Expire the link after this many clicks.

hide_referrer.description: Whether to hide the referrer from the destination.

anyOf.description: Custom HTML tags for the document head.
Custom HTML tags for the document body.
The value matched by the rule.
The destination URL used when the rule matches.
The percentage assigned to this rule.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a Linkly link.

clicks_thirty_days.description: Number of clicks in the last 30 days.

anyOf.description: The value matched by the rule.
The destination URL used when the rule matches.
The percentage assigned to this rule.

items.description: A redirect rule returned by Linkly.

actions.name: delete_link
actions.description: Delete a Linkly short link from a workspace.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a Linkly link.

message.description: Delete result message returned by Linkly.

actions.name: get_link
actions.description: Get a Linkly link by ID, optionally scoped to a workspace.

inputSchema.description: Input for getting a Linkly link.

clicks_thirty_days.description: Number of clicks in the last 30 days.

anyOf.description: The value matched by the rule.
The destination URL used when the rule matches.
The percentage assigned to this rule.

items.description: A redirect rule returned by Linkly.

actions.name: list_links
actions.description: List links in a Linkly workspace with optional search, filters, and pagination.

filter.description: Exact-match filters for listing Linkly workspace links.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Linkly workspace links.

clicks_thirty_days.description: Number of clicks in the last 30 days.

anyOf.description: The value matched by the rule.
The destination URL used when the rule matches.
The percentage assigned to this rule.

items.description: A redirect rule returned by Linkly.

total_entries.description: Number of entries matching the query.

workspace_link_count.description: Total number of links in the workspace.

actions.name: list_workspaces
actions.description: List Linkly workspaces available to the authenticated API key.
